text: £ Question Technique A * Try and eliminate any crazy answers ¢ Find what matters in the question ¢ Highlight and remove any question fluff ¢ |dentify what matters in the answers ¢ Eliminate any bad answers now you've read the question ¢ |deally ... what remains is correct e .. worst case, quickly select between what remains * DON'T PANIC .. mark for review and come back later
